orders..read: auth != null && ((query.orderByChild == 'uid' && query.equalTo == auth.uid) || auth.token.email == 'unlimitedtopup001@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'vishnubangaru001@gmail.com')

$orderId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('uid').val() == auth.uid) || auth.token.email == 'unlimitedtopup001@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'vishnubangaru001@gmail.com' || (data.exists() && data.child('uid').val() == auth.uid && newData.child('uid').val() == data.child('uid').val() && newData.child('status').val() == data.child('status').val() && newData.child('pointsEarned').val() == data.child('pointsEarned').val() && ((!data.child('gameKey').exists() && newData.child('gameKey').val() == 'Pending') || newData.child('gameKey').val() == data.child('gameKey').val())))
$orderId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['uid', 'game', 'bundle', 'amount', 'status', 'createdAt']) && newData.child('uid').isString() && newData.child('game').isString() && newData.child('bundle').isString() && newData.child('amount').isNumber() && newData.child('status').isString() && (!newData.child('pointsEarned').exists() || (newData.child('pointsEarned').isNumber() && newData.child('pointsEarned').val() >= 0))

redemptions..read: auth != null && ((query.orderByChild == 'uid' && query.equalTo == auth.uid) || (query.orderByChild == 'accountEmail' && query.equalTo == auth.token.email) || auth.token.email == 'unlimitedtopup001@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'vishnubangaru001@gmail.com')

$redemptionId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('uid').val() == auth.uid) || auth.token.email == 'unlimitedtopup001@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'vishnubangaru001@gmail.com')

$notificationId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['name', 'email', 'mobile', 'product', 'status', 'createdAt']) && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('email').isString() && newData.child('mobile').isString() && newData.child('product').val() == 'GTA 6' && newData.child('status').val() == 'Notification Enabled'
